## Review Findings

- [ ] Reviewer findings captured (or "No findings")
- [ ] Findings addressed with follow-up commits

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run test:ci`
- [ ] `npm run build`

## Tests

- [ ] Tests added/updated for changed behavior
- [ ] If no tests were added, include justification and add `[no-tests]` token here

## Risk Check

- [ ] Backward compatibility assessed
- [ ] Security/permission changes assessed
- [ ] Data model or migration impact assessed
